Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class AIPredictionEvent

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.AIPredictionEvent
public class AIPredictionEvent extends SObject

Java class for AIPredictionEvent complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="AIPredictionEvent">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="Confidence" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}double" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedBy" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}User" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedById" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="CreatedDate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}dateTime" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="EventUuid" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="FieldName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="HasError" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="InsightId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="PredictionEntityId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ReplayId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="TargetId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
